overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic Asian-inspired urban district during golden hour. The character traverses elevated walkways, streets with light traffic, and narrow alleys lined with neon signs and traditional architectural elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with construction scaffolding

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated green walkway following two pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking ahead of ego on the walkway

entered.detail: multi-story building covered in green construction scaffolding and metal framework
dense network of electrical cables and wires crisscrossing above the street
futuristic high-rise towers with illuminated windows visible in the background
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway with a distinctive green surface. The camera follows a character walking behind two pedestrians, with a large building covered in green construction scaffolding dominating the right side. Overhead, a dense web of power lines stretches across the view, while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the distance against a clear golden-hour sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with vehicle traffic approaching traditional gate

events.description: descends from elevated walkway to street level alongside vehicle road
black sedan and red sports car drive past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along street sidewalk approaching large red traditional gate structure in the distance

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street passing by the camera

entered.detail: large red traditional Asian gate structure with black roof spanning across the street ahead
tall metal street light pole with traffic signals attached

segments.scene_description: The character descends to street level, transitioning from the elevated walkway to a sidewalk alongside a road with light vehicle traffic. A prominent red traditional gate structure becomes visible in the distance, marking the entrance to a distinct district. Vehicles including a black sedan pass by on the left as the camera continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with neon signs and traditional gate crossing

events.description: passes underneath the large red traditional gate structure
passing into shadow of buildings with neon signs becoming more prominent against darkening facades

agents.ego_description: walking through gate area past neon signs and red paper lanterns lining the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking alongside the storefronts

entered.detail: string of traditional red paper lanterns hanging outside shop entrance
circular neon sign with Japanese characters and food imagery glowing pink and blue
storefront with green canvas awning and outdoor seating area

segments.scene_description: The character passes underneath the imposing red gate, entering a commercial area lined with neon signage. Red paper lanterns hang outside shops on the right, and a prominent circular neon ramen sign glows ahead. The lighting shifts as the character moves into the shadow of taller buildings, with artificial neon becoming more prominent against the warm natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with food stalls and enclosed shop fronts

events.description: enters narrower alleyway with food stalls and enclosed shop fronts on both sides
large green dumpster temporarily blocks view of the right side storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking past food vendors and shop entrances in the increasingly narrow commercial alley

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple jacket standing near the street edge looking at storefront

entered.detail: open-air food service counter with stools and illuminated menu displays under green awning
green fluorescent tube lighting under shop awnings illuminating the walkway
narrow passage between tall concrete buildings leading deeper into the district

segments.scene_description: The street narrows into a commercial alley lined with food stalls and shops. The character walks past an open-air food counter with green neon lighting under the awnings. The space becomes more enclosed as the character approaches a narrow passage between tall buildings, with pedestrians browsing the storefronts along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed back alley with overhead walkways and gathered NPCs

events.description: enters deeply enclosed alley with tall walls on both sides and overhead pedestrian bridge
lighting shifts to darker artificial tones with red neon accent lights on walls

agents.ego_description: entering narrow alleyway approaching a group of gathered characters near the end

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs standing in conversation in the alley ahead
character with green glowing glasses and studded jacket walking past camera

entered.detail: metal and glass pedestrian bridge connecting buildings overhead with red neon accents
tall concrete building wall with industrial pipes and small windows
dark building facade with metal shutters and ventilation units

segments.scene_description: The character enters a deeply enclosed back alley with tall concrete walls on both sides and an overhead pedestrian bridge connecting the buildings. The lighting shifts to darker artificial tones with red neon accents. The character approaches a group of NPCs gathered in conversation ahead, while another pedestrian with distinctive green glowing glasses passes by in the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, elevated walkway into the depths of a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban alley. It begins on a green pedestrian path beneath a web of power lines, moving past construction scaffolding and distant skyscrapers under a clear golden-hour sky. As the character descends to street level, the scene opens onto a road with light traffic before passing under a prominent red traditional gate that marks the entrance to a commercial district. The environment then shifts from warm natural light to the glow of red lanterns and circular neon signs, narrowing further into a crowded commercial alley lined with food stalls. Finally, the space becomes deeply enclosed by tall concrete walls and an overhead bridge, where the lighting turns to dark artificial tones with red neon accents as the camera approaches a group of gathered pedestrians.
